description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) Part of a children’s Hebrew textbook, consisting of the alphabet vocalised with the various Tiberian vowels on leaf 2; further alphabetical exercises on f. 1v; passage from Leviticus 1:15-17 with standard Tiberian vocalisation. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: ספר לימוד עברי לילדים: אלפבית עם ניקוד טברני, תרגילי אלפבית נוספים, וקטע מויקרא א:15-17 עם ניקוד
